targets.rawSql: SELECT datetime(incident_time, 'unixepoch') as time, count(*) as value FROM incidents GROUP BY incident_time ORDER BY incident_time

SELECT datetime(timestamp, 'unixepoch') as time, CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN severity='error' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL)/COUNT(*) as error_rate, service FROM logs WHERE timestamp > strftime('%s', 'now', '-1 hour') GROUP BY service, time ORDER BY time
SELECT datetime(timestamp, 'unixepoch') as time, duration_ms, service FROM traces WHERE timestamp > strftime('%s', 'now', '-1 hour')

SELECT service, MAX(timestamp) as last_heartbeat, CASE WHEN MAX(timestamp) > strftime('%s', 'now', '-5 minute') THEN 'OK' ELSE 'MISSING' END as status FROM events WHERE type='heartbeat' GROUP BY service
SELECT id, datetime(incident_time,'unixepoch') as time, detection_method, resolution_status FROM incidents ORDER BY incident_time DESC LIMIT 20
